options.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const manifest=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(path.join(root,'manifest.json'),'utf8'));const id=manifest.id;const buildDir=path.join(root,'dist','apps','obsidian-vps-publish');const outDir=path.join(root,'dist',id);const ensure=(p,n)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error(`${n} not found: ${p}`)};const main=path.join(buildDir,'main.js');ensure(main,'main.js');fs.rmSync(outDir,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(outDir,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync(main,path.join(outDir,'main.js'));fs.copyFileSync(path.join(root,'manifest.json'),path.join(outDir,'manifest.json'));const styles=path.join(root,'apps','obsidian-vps-publish','styles.css');if(fs.existsSync(styles)) fs.copyFileSync(styles,path.join(outDir,'styles.css'));const versions=path.join(root,'apps','obsidian-vps-publish','versions.json');if(fs.existsSync(versions)) fs.copyFileSync(versions,path.join(outDir,'versions.json'));"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=process.cwd();const vaultDir=path.join(root,'test-vault', '.obsidian','plugins','vps-publish');const buildDir=path.join(root,'dist','vps-publish');const dataFile=path.join(vaultDir,'data.json');const ensure=(p,n)=>{if(!fs.existsSync(p)) throw new Error(`${n} not found: ${p}`)};ensure(buildDir,'build output');const backupData=fs.existsSync(dataFile)?fs.readFileSync(dataFile,'utf8'):null;fs.rmSync(vaultDir,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(vaultDir,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(buildDir,vaultDir,{recursive:true});if(backupData) fs.writeFileSync(dataFile,backupData,'utf8');const mf=path.join(vaultDir,'manifest.json');const m=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(mf,'utf8'));const now=new Date();const pad=(x)=>String(x).padStart(2,'0');const ts=now.getFullYear()+pad(now.getMonth()+1)+pad(now.getDate())+'-'+pad(now.getHours())+pad(now.getMinutes())+pad(now.getSeconds());m.version=m.version+'-dev.'+ts;fs.writeFileSync(mf,JSON.stringify(m,null,2),'utf8');"
